title: Assemblymember Cecilia Aguiar-Curry (D-Winters) made the following statement today after the announcement that the investigation of the Tubbs Fire has been concluded:

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The cause of the Tubbs Fire was identified as a failure of the homeowner's equipment, likely influenced by weather conditions.",
    "There has been an increasing number and seriousness of wildfires over the past several years.",
    "Changing conditions in the environment will continue to result in more frequent and more serious wildfires.",
    "When the climate is drier and hotter, better land use planning and maintenance of private and public spaces are necessary.",
    "Strengthening partnerships with private entities, homeowners, and local and federal governments is crucial for effective fire management.",
    "The Governor’s budget proposal allocates significant new resources to emergency response and alert systems in California.",
    "The budget directs hundreds of millions of dollars to fire prevention activities aimed at reducing future wildfire events."
  ]
}
```
